description: Product Description HAIR ACADEMY HAIR BRUSH OBLONG BLACK Directions Apply a pea-sized amount of toothpaste onto a soft-bristled toothbrush. Brush in circular motions for 2 minutes, covering all surfaces of the teeth. Rinse thoroughly with water. Safety Warning For children 6 years and older: use a quantity of peas for supervised brushing to minimize ingestion. See more
